data.title: Hackers Drain Bank Accounts in New Global Attack on Apple and Google Android Devices: Samsung Alert
data.description:
Hackers are draining bank accounts and stealing smartphone users’ credentials using a new and highly effective technique, according to Samsung. The tech giant says cybercriminals are now sending text messages that appear to be from banks and delivery services – with PDF files attached. The PDFs either contain links that exploit security flaws and install […]
The post Hackers Drain Bank...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/20/hackers-drain-bank-accounts-in-new-global-attack-on-apple-and-google-android-devices-samsung-alert/

data.title: Russian authorities unblock website of crypto exchange data aggregator BestChange
data.description:
The Russia-based crypto website BestChange is accessible once again. The website aggregates exchange information and may have been blocked for violating a law on advertising passed last year. The BestChange website was blocked on Feb. 10 without warning and added to the list of banned websites maintained by Roskomnadzor, the federal communications authority. It was […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russian-authorities-unblock-website-of-crypto-exchange-data-aggregator-bestchange/

data.title: Dogecoin Price: Weak Demand Despite Support Retest, ETF Hype
data.description:
Bullish expectations for Dogecoin price action this month have so far been met with disappointment as the cryptocurrency failed to exit its current range. This is despite receiving a substantial discount over the last 3 months and retesting a key support zone. Dogecoin price has maintained an overall bearish trend that is for the most […]
The post Dogecoin Price: Weak Demand Despite Support...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/20/dogecoin-price-weak-demand-despite-support-retest-etf-hype/

data.title: Ethereum gas fees crash 70% to 4-year lows – What’s driving the deep drop?
data.description:

source: https://ambcrypto.com/ethereum-gas-fees-crash-70-to-4-year-lows-whats-driving-the-deep-drop/

data.title: Coinbase and Binance Add Support for New ‘InfoAI’ Altcoin KAITO
data.description:
Top crypto exchange platforms Coinbase and Binance are adding support for a new artificial intelligence (AI)-focused altcoin. In a new announcement, Coinbase says it is adding support for InfoAI altcoin Kaito (KAITO) on the Base network, the firm’s own blockchain, with an Experimental label. Binance, the world’s largest crypto exchange by volume, also added support […]
The post Coinbase and...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/20/coinbase-and-binance-add-support-for-new-infoai-altcoin-kaito/

data.title: Monero mining malware hidden inside popular game torrents
data.description:
Hackers launched a mass infection campaign to distribute a Monero mining program that could be activated remotely. The hackers delivered the mining payload via popular game torrents and primarily targeted gamers, as gaming PCs commonly tend to have stronger processors with more than 8 cores. According to a recent report by Kaspersky, hackers launched a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/monero-mining-malware-in-game-torrents/

data.title: Canada’s OSFI sets new crypto risk guidelines for banks as adoption surges
data.description:
Canada’s banking watchdog has released new principles designed to guide banks in managing their exposure to cryptocurrency.
